findings.description: Supersession could not satisfy the one-approved-version invariant because the replacement could not already be approved.
findings.repair: Approve a reviewed same-procedure replacement and supersede the former approved version in one transaction; lock and validate replacement status; record approval and supersession audits.

findings.description: Invalid replay cleanup and error emission occurred in the same transaction, so the cleanup would roll back.
findings.repair: Commit invalidation and audit first, then emit generic 500 outside the transaction.

findings.description: A request observing another request's processing claim could release that claim on error.
findings.repair: Release idempotency state only when the current request obtained a new claim.

findings.description: Lifecycle audit SQL referenced a nonexistent principal_id column.
findings.repair: Use canonical actor_external_id and add a static schema-drift regression.

findings.description: ClaimPack rate-limit SQL contained an unbalanced retry-after expression that mocks did not execute.
findings.repair: Correct the SQL expression and require a production-shaped PostgreSQL smoke plus static balance assertion.

findings.description: ProcedureQuery and ClaimPack positive fixtures did not preserve a step-level evidence phrase in the generated excerpt, encouraging unsupported claim expectations.
findings.repair: Strengthen only the disposable official fixture and require explicit missing_evidence when no claim is citable.
evidence: one supported cited step and 46 explicit gaps

findings.description: Lifecycle preflight advertised GET and POST on every route.
findings.repair: Advertise only POST for mutation routes and GET for item reads.

open_global_findings: Corpus completeness and real ingestion are unproved.
ProcedureAssessment, procedure cases, lifecycle UI/accessibility, external consumers, and platform operations remain incomplete.
Remote CI, PR review state, protected merge, and deployment remain unproved.
